description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly manicured lawn. The front features a driveway leading to an attached garage, a small porch, and a car parked outside. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a patio with outdoor furniture, and a wooden play structure with swings, indicating a family-friendly environment. The exterior walls are primarily finished in light brown brick, with some sections in white, and large windows provide ample natural light. Landscaping includes a few shrubs and a tree, adding greenery to the property. The house is set on a flat plot, with clear boundaries and a contemporary, minimalist design.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, brick and white exterior, attached garage, pool, patio, and play structure, set on a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, attached garage, main entrance, car, and front landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, car, and the backyard with pool and play structure visible in the distance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio with furniture, and wooden play structure, with minimal windows on the back wall.
description_view_3: Side view showing the main entrance, front landscaping, swingset, and a clear view of the pool and patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main entry with a small porch, single door, and minimal decorative elements, adjacent to the garage
